title: MikroTik Power adapter 24V 1.5A, straight plug
description: Original MikroTik power adapter with direct installation in a socket with a standard 5.5 / 2.1mm connector designed for powering MikroTik devices with an input voltage 24V DC . The power adapter has a maximum power of 36W and a maximum output current of 1.5A
